payload.title: Unified work-next lacks a read-only peek mode
payload.summary: Agents need a way to inspect next admissible work without claiming or mutating state; current unified work-next has no --peek option.
evidence: A previous work-next check selected and claimed Task 164 before the caller intended mutation.
payload.proposed_action: Add narada work-next --peek as a no-claim read-only inspection mode.
